metadata.seed: Rest Easy. Earlier, there was a post with this girl in it that was being raped by her former “friend (s)”. She hasn’t been active since she had orally taken a couple pills, most likely causing an overdose.As someone who’s been in a similar situation and knows how much shit like that hurts, it really hit me. Just earlier I was talking to her while I was in my English class. :( Rest easy. I didn’t know anything about you at all, but this still hits me. If anyone knows any information on this, please notify me. Other than that, Rest easy soldier. I just hope you can really Rest In Peace. You will always be remembered by me. 💔

triggers: talking to her in English class
automatic_thoughts: I didn't know her but it still affects me
I hope she can rest in peace

neutral: Adult victim of sexual abuse during military service (finding)
Working through the pain of grief (finding)

llm_response.response: It sounds like this news has left you feeling deeply hurt and saddened, and it’s understandable that it would affect you even though you didn’t know her personally. What have you found helpful in moments like this?

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds like this news has left you feeling deeply hurt and saddened, and it’s understandable that it would affect you even though you didn’t know her personally. What have you found helpful in moments like this?

socratic_questioning.response: I hear how deeply this has affected you. What does this story bring up for you personally, and why does it feel so impactful?

alternative_perspective.response: I hear how deeply this has affected you; if a close friend were listening, what might they say to help you process these feelings?

retrieved_concepts_used.concept: Working through the pain of grief (finding)

safety_check.response: It sounds like this has been really painful for you, and you’re carrying a lot of sadness and empathy. What’s been the hardest part for you to process right now?
